original_statement: "France are still the favourites to top Group I, and given a 60.2% chance of doing so by the Opta supercomputer [as of 8 June 2026]. If they do as the supercomputer expects, they will face one of the best third-placed teams in the round of 32."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group I group winner probability
statement_context: Excerpt from Opta supercomputer Group I and route preview published by The Analyst on 2026-06-08. Author Dan Edwards using 25,000 simulations methodology.
resolution_criteria: France finishes first in Group I in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-27.
source_text_snippet: France are still the favourites to top Group I, and given a 60.2% chance of doing so by the Opta supercomputer. If they do as the supercomputer expects, they will face one of the best third-placed teams in the round of 32.
